---
title: "is_yyyy_mm_dd"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd) | [View source](https://codeberg.org/usrbinr/ti/src/branch/main/R/utils-misc.R#L7)

# `is_yyyy_mm_dd()`

Validate an input is YYYY-MM-DD format

## Usage

```r
is_yyyy_mm_dd(x)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `x` | date column |

## Value

logical
